entry.title: IDC W91QVN18D0008 (P00070) awarded to KOREA ELECTRIC POWER CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: SUPPLY OF ELECTRICITY FOR USFK LOCATIONS

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:manufacturingOrganizationType.description: FOREIGN-OWNED BUSINESS NOT INCORPORATED IN THE U.S.
